nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (Every 6h)
nodes.notes: Runs signal detection every 6 hours during business hours

nodes.name: Google News RSS - Healthcare Signals
nodes.notes: Monitors Google News for healthcare admin pain signals: prior auth issues, clinic expansions, RCM hiring

nodes.name: Google News RSS - Expansion Signals
nodes.notes: Monitors for clinic expansion signals - new locations, mergers, growth announcements

nodes.name: Google News RSS - EHR Migration Signals
nodes.notes: Detects EHR migration/switching events - orgs in transition are open to new tooling

nodes.name: Parse & Classify Signals
nodes.notes: Deduplicates signals, classifies by type (pain/expansion/EHR migration/tech adoption), extracts org names, assigns signal strength

nodes.name: Filter: Medium+ Signals Only
nodes.notes: Drops low-quality signals to avoid wasting Clay enrichment credits

nodes.name: Push to Clay for Enrichment
nodes.notes: Sends signal to Clay table via webhook. Clay then runs waterfall enrichment: firmographics, technographics, contact mapping, pain indicators.

nodes.name: Slack: Signal Alert
nodes.notes: Posts real-time signal alert to #gtm-signals Slack channel for founder visibility

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends every signal to a master Google Sheet for tracking, reporting, and feedback loop analysis

main.node: Google News RSS - EHR Migration Signals
